title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 18 - 2017: World's Battles Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day on February 18, 2017 in Boulder, covering getting high and sleeping in, cleaning his car (dealing with excess detergent from a 2012 mistake), and briefly showing off a desktop background depicting all of history's battles. He plans to film artistic car videos the next day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: forced cleaning turned out well; car is looking great and he's excited to film it
thinks it's cool and Google-certified; worth sharing
